title: Unify RCA into category-first hierarchy with topic/example drill-down

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Kickoff: implementing unified RCA hierarchy payload + dashboard category-first tree; removing duplicate topic hierarchy, preserving segmented breakdown and secondary global narrative, and adding targeted backend/frontend tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented unified RCA hierarchy. Backend now emits misclassification_analysis.category_hierarchy with category->topic->example structure (majority topic category assignment + purity + mechanical subtype totals). EvaluationTask now renders one category-first triage tree and removes duplicate standalone TopicList hierarchy from evaluation detail. Added category/topic score-result filters (mutually exclusive), triage confidence labeling, and standardized predicted->actual display via LabelBadgeComparison. Updated evaluate-score docs and expanded tests for hierarchy/filter behavior.
